--- import type { ImageMetadata } from "astro" import { Image } from "astro:assets" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Price, PriceUnit, PriceValue } from "@/components/ui/price" import { Section, SectionContainer } from "@/components/ui/section" type Props = { class?: string badge: string title: string buttons: { label: string href: string variant?: "default" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" }[] products: { image: { src: ImageMetadata alt: string } title: string description: string price: { value: number currency: string unit: string } }[] } const { class: className, badge, title, buttons, products } = Astro.props ---
{badge}

{title}

{ buttons.map(({ href, label, ...button }) => ( )) }
{ products.map((product) => (
{product.title} {product.description} {product.price.unit} )) }
